title: Queue an event for a P1 incident
question: Write a script snippet that queues an event when an incident becomes Priority 1.
summary: Shows how to decouple business logic from notifications using gs.eventQueue.
exactAnswer: Use gs.eventQueue with the event name and current record when the incident priority becomes 1. A notification or script action can then subscribe to the event.
steps: Create or confirm the named event record if your design requires it.
Add the script in a business rule or flow action context.
Trigger the event only when the record qualifies for P1.
commonMistakes: Triggering the event on every update instead of only on the transition to P1.
Embedding email recipient logic directly in the same business rule.
explanation: eventQueue allows notifications to listen to meaningful events rather than duplicating conditions everywhere.
